name: Political & Military Ambition
description: Political and military goals, strategies, and ambitions that drive NATO operations and alliance activities.

children.name: Political Objectives
children.description: High-level political goals and objectives of the alliance and member nations.

children.name: Alliance Cohesion
children.description: Policies and measures to maintain unity and coherence among NATO member states.

children.name: Consensus Building
children.description: Processes and mechanisms for achieving political consensus among member nations.

children.name: Partnership Engagement
children.description: Engagement with partner nations and organizations to strengthen alliance relationships.

children.name: Crisis Management
children.description: Political frameworks and decisions for managing international crises.

children.name: Early Warning
children.description: Mechanisms for early detection and political response to emerging crises.

children.name: Conflict Prevention
children.description: Diplomatic and political measures to prevent the outbreak of conflict.

children.name: Military Strategy
children.description: Overarching military strategies and doctrines guiding NATO military activities.

children.name: Deterrence Strategy
children.description: Strategies and postures designed to deter potential adversaries.

children.name: Nuclear Deterrence
children.description: Nuclear posture and policies contributing to strategic deterrence.

children.name: Conventional Deterrence
children.description: Conventional military posture and readiness contributing to deterrence.

children.name: Collective Defence
children.description: Military planning and posture for collective defence under Article 5.

children.name: Forward Presence
children.description: Enhanced forward military presence on NATO's eastern flank.

children.name: Rapid Reinforcement
children.description: Capabilities and plans for rapid military reinforcement of threatened members.

children.name: Arms Control & Disarmament
children.description: NATO policies and positions on arms control, disarmament, and non-proliferation.

children.name: Arms Control Treaties
children.description: Participation in and compliance with international arms control agreements.

children.name: Non-Proliferation
children.description: Efforts to prevent the spread of weapons of mass destruction.

name: Mission-to-Task Decomposition
description: Framework for breaking down missions into tasks, sub-tasks, and activities at various command levels.

children.description: Mission decomposition at the strategic command level.

children.description: Strategic campaign plan development and management.

children.name: Objective Setting
children.description: Definition of strategic military objectives for campaigns.

children.name: Phase Planning
children.description: Planning distinct campaign phases and transitions.

children.name: Strategic Assessment
children.description: Assessment of strategic situation and effectiveness of operations.

children.name: Intelligence Assessment
children.description: Analysis of intelligence to support strategic decision-making.

children.name: Effects Assessment
children.description: Measurement and assessment of operational effects.

children.name: Operational Level
children.description: Mission decomposition at the operational command level.

children.name: Joint Operation Planning
children.description: Planning of joint operations across multiple domains.

children.description: Planning for land-based operational activities.

children.description: Planning for maritime operational activities.

children.name: Air Operations Planning
children.description: Planning for air operational activities.

children.name: Operational Logistics
children.description: Logistic support planning at the operational level.

children.name: Supply Chain Management
children.description: Management of supply chains supporting operations.

children.name: Medical Support Planning
children.description: Planning of medical support for operational forces.

children.name: Tactical Level

children.description: Execution of tactical tasks and activities.

children.description: Coordination of tactical manoeuvre activities.
